# MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.globalFlatten2D

**Case**

Returns indices flattened in 2 innermost dimensions. eg: HW in NCHW.

## Declaration

```swift
case globalFlatten2D
```
title: MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.globalFlatten2D
